title: Any updates on on being able to connect a new board to a dashboard automatically?
excerpt:
I know this is a big feature we’ve been requesting for a while. But has anyone heard anything or know of any apps that allow for an automatic or semi-automatic connection of new boards to a certain dashboard? 
Basically …

posts.author: CFranklyn11 (Christian Franklyn | Orangedot | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know this is a big feature we’ve been requesting for a while. But has anyone heard anything or know of any apps that allow for an automatic or semi-automatic connection of new boards to a certain dashboard?

Basically just looking for something where if I generate a board, I can do one simple action (click a button, move to a folder) and then the board automatically is connected to a dashboard.
